message:
fix: add post-claim verification to prevent TOCTOU double-processing (gt-l29bi)

The queue claim operation was non-atomic: list unclaimed messages, then
claim the oldest. Between these steps another worker could claim the same
message, leading to double-processing.

Add post-claim verification that re-reads the message after claiming and
confirms claimed-by matches the caller. If another worker won the race,
the stale claim labels are cleaned up and the next candidate is tried.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
